title: Ruqi Heat Wave
lead: Ruqi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.83. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ruqi has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 24%, but the wind speed of 14.1 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) forecasted, indicating no relief from the high temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect citizens and infrastructure.
